{{Infobox character
| name = Caela
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = advisor, Traveler
| abilities = Dragon’s Fang
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Caela Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caela is a figure characterized by her blue bonnet and wooden hands. She possesses the ability to communicate through a shifting, windy voice that can be sent as messages or shouted. She has been observed resting on crates of miscellaneous items and has also been positioned on a person's belt. Caela acts as a guide and source of wisdom, offering direction and instructions to [[Simon]], including commands to move forward or face specific enemies. She claims knowledge regarding the [[Travelers]] of [[Valinhall]] and suggests she possesses information that the [[Eldest]] would withhold. While she displays a confident, sometimes smug, and even purring personality, she also experiences emotions such as awe and sadness. She is associated with [[Kai]] and has been described as a [[Dragon's Fang]].}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caela is a doll with short, curly blond hair who wears a sky blue dress and matching bonnet. While being cared for by [[Kai]], she claims to hear the voice of the wind and speak the words of the air. After whispering a warning that people were approaching, she eventually replaced [[Otoku]] as an advisor to [[Simon]]. Though her face maintains a peaceful expression, she remains attached to [[Simon]]'s belt where she can communicate with him and return to [[the House]]. During their journey, she informs [[Simon]] that he killed an [[Overlord]] and advises him to seek out the [[Travelers]] atop the canyon.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] is a doll with short, curly blond hair, a sky blue bonnet, and a matching dress.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] is being cared for by [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] claims to hear the voice of the wind and speak the words of the air.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] provides [[Simon]] with advice.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] whispered that people were about to come in.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] is a doll whose face shows an expression of peace.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] is an advisor to [[Simon]] who replaced [[Otoku]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21">''House of Blades'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] is located on [[Simon]]'s belt and can communicate with him.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22">''House of Blades'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] can return to [[the House]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] tells [[Simon]] that he killed an [[Overlord]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Caela]] advises [[Simon]] to head for the [[Travelers]] on top of the canyon.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Caela is a blond talking doll dressed in a powder-blue bonnet and dress who travels alongside [[Simon]]. As a [[Traveler]] wielding a Dragon’s [[Fang]], she maintains communication with him and is known to respond to his thoughts with sarcasm or jokes. During their journey, [[Simon]] was once seen carrying her in a single hand. In a critical moment, she warned [[Simon]] that he faced only two minutes before death, insanity, or merging with the [[Incarnation]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is currently with [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is someone whom the narrator wishes were present.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] communicates with [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is someone who would respond to [[Simon]] with a joke or sarcasm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] carried [[Caela]] in one hand.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is a blond doll in a powder-blue dress and bonnet.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is a girl and a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] wields a Dragon’s [[Fang]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] warns [[Simon]] that he has about two minutes before he dies, goes insane, or merges with the [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is a talking doll.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is a doll that communicates with [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Caela]] is a character who could respond to [[Simon]]'s thoughts.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caela is a doll characterized by curly blond hair, a blue bonnet, and a painted wooden frown. Though she possesses wooden hands, she communicates through a mental voice and serves as a companion to [[Simon]], often sitting upon his shoulder. During combat, she provides tactical directions to [[Kai]], but she also acts as an observer of the events around her. While being held by [[Leah]], Caela observes [[Simon]]'s white chains and warns him that his time has run out.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] has curly blond hair.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] is a doll wearing a blue bonnet.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] has wooden hands and wears a bonnet.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] communicates via a mental voice.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] is a character who provides tactical directions to [[Kai]] during his fight.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] is a companion to [[Simon]] who can sit on his shoulder.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] is present and observing.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] tells [[Simon]] he is out of time.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] observes [[Simon]]'s white chains.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] is a doll that [[Leah]] was holding.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] has a blue bonnet and a painted wooden frown.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“They’re about to come in, Caela’s voice whispered, just as the canvas behind Simon peeled open.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
